memoryArtifacts.headline: Sanquhar Castle was built by the Crichton family in the 13th century.
memoryArtifacts.description: Sanquhar Castle, now a ruin, was built by the Crichton family in the 13th century. Situated on the southern approach to the former royal burgh of Sanquhar in Dumfries and Galloway, south west Scotland, it sits on the trail of the Southern Upland Way

memoryArtifacts.headline: Occupations

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld於1430年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar22歲，母親Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson16歲。他和Lady Marion Stewart至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1492年2月12日在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton-
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld was born in 1430, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, was 16. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Lady Marion Stewart. He died on 12 February 1492, in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld est né en 1430, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann d’Erskine Baroness Gibson, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Marion Stewart. Il est décédé le 12 février 1492, à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld 1430 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson 16. Er hatte mit Lady Marion Stewart mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Februar 1492 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilldが1430年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquharは22歳，母Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibsonは16歳であった。彼はLady Marion Stewartとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1492年2月12日にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Crichton- I. Fourth Lord Crichton Of Sanquhar Of Kennwilld(이)가 1430년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Lady Marion Stewart(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 2월 12일 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.
